title: Tank Pressure Sensor Interface — MPRLS/MPX5700
selected_approach: Honeywell MPRLS (I2C, 0–25 psi absolute) or Freescale MPX5700 (analog 0–700 kPa) read tank pressure every 10 ms. ADC averaged over 4 samples. Pressure drop per pulse used to estimate propellant mass expended and cross-check commanded impulse against Tsiolkovsky ΔV model.
